prompt: Create a realistic full-body portrait of a 25-year-old adult East Asian woman with a cute and soft appearance, standing in front of a light wood door indoors. She has fair skin, a sweet rounded face, large brown eyes, soft glossy lips, rosy shy cheeks, and a gentle, bashful smile. She has light greyish-brown shoulder-length hair with soft curls at the ends, straight bangs, and loose strands framing her face. She is wearing cute heart-shaped earrings. Body Type: Soft plus-size/curvy figure with natural realistic proportions, a rounded soft shape, wide hips, thick thighs, and a warm, approachable look. Make her look healthy, cute, natural, and real, not exaggerated. Pose: Standing facing the camera, full body visible from head to toe. Her knees are slightly turned inward in a shy, cute pose. One hand lightly holds the edge of her cardigan, and the other is naturally placed near her shorts pocket. Shoulders are slightly relaxed, with bashful yet modest body language. Clothing: A white fitted camisole fully covering the chest and waist, a light grey cardigan, light grey casual shorts with drawstrings, and black knee-high socks. The clothes are opaque, comfortable, casual, and realistic, with natural folds, fabric stretch, and soft indentations around the waist and thighs. Scene: A minimalist apartment entrance or bedroom doorway, with a light wood door behind her, clean floors, soft indoor lighting, warm neutral tones, and a quiet, private home atmosphere. Full-body vertical composition, 9:16 aspect ratio. Photography Style: Realistic smartphone photo, natural skin texture, soft indoor light, slightly handheld perspective, high detail, a lifelike cozy home portrait, realistic hair strands, authentic fabric folds, and natural body proportions. Avoid anime style, illustrations, CGI looks, underage appearance, thin body types, exaggerated fantasy proportions, explicit nudity, transparent clothing, overly sexual poses, distorted hands, extra fingers, bad anatomy, plastic skin, over-smoothed faces, and low resolution.
